title: refactor: route Grok Imagine Pro through OpenRouter
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Routes `grok-imagine-pro` and its existing aliases to the exact `x-ai/grok-imagine-image-quality` OpenRouter endpoint.
- Preserves text-to-image, one-image editing, 1K output, paid-only access, and the existing $0.05 output / $0.01 input-image prices. Basic `grok-imagine` remains on direct xAI; there is no fallback.
- Local E2E covered canonical + aliases, square/wide/tall generation, editing, cache MISS/HIT, invalid input, and a 10-request concurrent burst. Staging Tinybird recorded `provider=openrouter`, $0.05 generation, and $0.06 edits.
- OpenRouter also reports synthetic image-token totals and provider cost; Pollinations intentionally normalizes those to one input/output image because this route is priced per image, not per provider token.
- Tests: 550 focused registry, image, billing, tracking, VCR, safety, and permission tests; `npm run typecheck`; Biome.

gist.headline: A new road for Grok
gist.blurb: Grok Imagine Pro has moved its image-making route through OpenRouter, while keeping its familiar aliases, editing tools, and per-image prices intact. Same flower, different pollination path.
gist.summary: Routed grok-imagine-pro and its existing aliases through OpenRouter's x-ai/grok-imagine-image-quality endpoint while preserving text-to-image, single-image editing, 1K output, paid-only access, and $0.05 output/$0.01 input-image pricing.
gist.impact: Grok Imagine Pro requests now use the OpenRouter provider route with the same generation and editing capabilities, aliases, image-based billing, and cache behavior users already rely on.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Grok Imagine Pro as a cozy image garden being redirected through a clearly marked OpenRouter path: Polli guides glowing 1K image postcards along a garden path into a friendly retro terminal labeled OPENROUTER. Include a single editable picture frame and small price-tag flowers to represent preserved image-based generation and editing billing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, the cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wearing a tiny courier cap as she carries a glowing image postcard down a lime green (#ecf874) garden path toward a warm CRT terminal with simple pixel text: "OPENROUTER"; an editable picture frame, code-plants, and pastel price-tag flowers sit nearby. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, chunky retro sprites, subtle CRT glow, nostalgic but beautiful.
